incident_roles.description: The person coordinating the incident response and driving resolution.
incident_roles.instructions:
- Ensure clear communication with stakeholders
- Delegate tasks and remove blockers
- Provide regular status updates
incident_roles.name: Incident Lead

incident_roles.description: The person who first reported the incident.
incident_roles.name: Reporter

incident_roles.description: Handles external communications to customers and partners during the incident.
incident_roles.instructions:
- Draft and send customer-facing status updates
- Coordinate with support team on messaging
incident_roles.name: Communications Lead
